"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.SyntaxError) syntax error at or near "case"
LINE 4:   FROM case
               ^

[SQL: SELECT ownerid, COUNT(*) AS case_count
FROM (
  SELECT ownerid
  FROM case
  WHERE createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT newvalue__c AS ownerid
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
) t
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"
